hints: Start by drawing the grid - a rectangle and four lines
Create helper functions for drawing crosses and circles
Use a 2D list (list of lists) to track which squares are occupied
Remember the first move is always 'o', alternating after that
Check for wins after each move by examining all 8 possible winning lines (3 rows, 3 columns, 2 diagonals)
For AI moves, first check if you can win, then check if you need to block, then pick any open square
